name: Quality Electrics
homeBenefit: Powering Homes & Businesses, Done Right First Time
areaBenefit: Certified Electrical Work, Done Right First Time

process.title: Get In Touch
process.detail: Call, email, or send an enquiry online and tell us what you need done.

process.title: Free Quote
process.detail: We give you a clear, no-obligation quote — with a site visit first if the job needs it.

process.title: Scheduled Work
process.detail: We agree a date that suits you and carry out the work to BS7671 standards.

process.title: Test & Certify
process.detail: Every job is tested and certified on completion, so you've got the paperwork you need.

process.title: Aftercare
process.detail: Questions after the job's done? We're a phone call away.
